item.title: Technique Matters for Red Carpet Glam
item.description: Smitha Deepak shares how technique can create a polished red carpet glam look without relying on expensive products.

media:content.media:title: Technique Matters for Red Carpet Glam
media:content.media:description: Smitha Deepak shares how technique can create a polished red carpet glam look without relying on expensive products.

item.title: 5-Min Gold Eyeshadow Look for Beginners
item.description: Smitha Deepak shares a quick gold eyeshadow look for beginners, with simple steps for an easy everyday style.

media:content.media:title: 5-Min Gold Eyeshadow Look for Beginners

item.title: Smitha Deepak’s Hair Mask Tutorial
item.description: A simple hair mask tutorial from Smitha Deepak, focused on helping hair look smooth and shiny.

media:content.media:title: Smitha Deepak’s Hair Mask Tutorial
media:content.media:description: A simple hair mask tutorial from Smitha Deepak, focused on helping hair look smooth and shiny.

item.title: I found the secret to a perfect foxy eye using just a piece of tape
item.description: Applying eyeshadow doesn't have to be a struggle, even if you have hooded eyes or are just starting out. In this tutorial, I'm breaking down three iconic looks—the foxy eye, the smoky eye, and the cut crease, using a surprisingly simple tool. You’ll see exactly how to prime, placement tricks with tape, and the "swipe and dab" method that ensures a perfect blend every single time.

media:content.media:title: I found the secret to a perfect foxy eye using just a piece of tape
media:content.media:description: Applying eyeshadow doesn't have to be a struggle, even if you have hooded eyes or are just starting out. In this tutorial, I'm breaking down three iconic looks—the foxy eye, the smoky eye, and the cut crease, using a surprisingly simple tool. You’ll see exactly how to prime, placement tricks with tape, and the "swipe and dab" method that ensures a perfect blend every single time.

item.title: Three-Product Routine for an Everyday Glow
item.description: Smitha Deepak shares a quick makeup routine using just three products for a polished, natural-looking everyday glow.

media:content.media:title: Three-Product Routine for an Everyday Glow
media:content.media:description: Smitha Deepak shares a quick makeup routine using just three products for a polished, natural-looking everyday glow.

item.title: 9 easy eyeliner styles for hooded eyes beginner tutorial
item.description: Struggling to make your eyeliner visible? In this tutorial, I break down nine different ways to master the wing specifically for hooded eyes. From the "invisible" tight line to the bold foxy eye, there is a style here for every occasion. Watch to see how to finally work around the fold instead of against it.

media:content.media:title: 9 easy eyeliner styles for hooded eyes beginner tutorial
media:content.media:description: Struggling to make your eyeliner visible? In this tutorial, I break down nine different ways to master the wing specifically for hooded eyes. From the "invisible" tight line to the bold foxy eye, there is a style here for every occasion. Watch to see how to finally work around the fold instead of against it.

item.title: Smitha Deepak: Under-Eye Setting Tips
item.description: Smitha Deepak shares a simple approach to setting under-eyes with a light hand for a smooth, crease-free finish.

item.title: Soft-Focus Hydrated Glow Makeup by Smitha Deepak

item.title: Makeup Tips For Droopy Eyes!
item.description: Lifting droopy eyes is all about placement and the right techniques. This guide shows you exactly how to apply your makeup to create a more awake, youthful appearance. From eyeliner tricks to shadow blending, these simple adjustments make a world of difference for your eye shape.

media:content.media:title: Makeup Tips For Droopy Eyes!
media:content.media:description: Lifting droopy eyes is all about placement and the right techniques. This guide shows you exactly how to apply your makeup to create a more awake, youthful appearance. From eyeliner tricks to shadow blending, these simple adjustments make a world of difference for your eye shape.
